uncertainties:
Assumptions:
- The existing parent issue number, title, body, and comments were not present in the workspace files, so placeholders such as `#<parent-issue-number>` and `<existing parent title>` were used.
- No repository code context was available, so likely files plus test/build commands remain placeholders.
- All four slices were treated as AFK because the prompt described implementation sequencing but did not name any human review or decision gate.
